name: GDSR Studio
description: A full OBS-style recording studio inside Geometry Dash. Hit F8 to record — live preview, audio mixer, hardware encoding. No alt-tabbing required.

show-on-startup.name: Show on startup
show-on-startup.description: Open the GDSR Studio window automatically when the game launches.

_hotkey-note.name: F8 toggles the studio window
_hotkey-note.description: Press F8 in-game to show or hide the GDSR Studio interface. (Informational)
